title: toolant Concrete Drill Bit Set & Masonry Drill Bit Set, Shockproof Hammer Drill Bit Set (5pcs) for Concrete/Glass/Brick/Plastic/Cement/Tile, Industrial Strength Carbide Drill Bit Tip, 4-10mm Box of 5

WIDELY USED - TOOLANT Concrete drill bit set is ideal for drilling holes in concrete, brick, glass, ceramic, tile and cement.
WARRANTY - TOOLANT genuine masonry&concrete drill bit set. Full refund or replacement offered. Do not hesitate to contact us via massage for any issues.
